description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 30 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 1 min. His tracked work was split mostly across Java, along with Other and Markdown. The data shows activity across 5 projects, but it does not include any public repository names or GitHub commits.
